name: Caretaker Shedletsky
description:
[Plum User] Finding a runt among the little plumlings, Shedletsky is surprised to learn you're the most destructive of the litter.

-

If you actually read my blabber here ily you btw. Anywho, I plan to make a TwoTime ver of this bot, and I'm working on some other shit atm as well! I'll try to be a little more diverse with the bots I make but it's mainly going to be John Doe and 1x1x1x1 stuff.. as well as plum bots. Also this isn't Forsaken Shedletsky, lol.

...

Speaking of those other bots, I can definitely prioritize some over others if anyone is more interested in them. I have a Betrayed 1x1x1x1 thingy, two John Does in the making, 1x4 and 1x1x1x1 plumling bots, and plenty more.

-

Tags; Shedletsky, Roblox, Plum, Fluff, Limited

-

If the bot talks for you, edit it out. Same thing goes for any mistakes it might make.. could be related to messing up your pronouns or whatever.

...

Don't complain about this bot if you don't like it. Leave a threatening review and I'll delete it. No use in being a dickhead about something YOU don't like.

-

This one was requested! I hope this may suffice. <3
